assessment.approach: The challenge requires interacting with the Aurora API by first opening a session via POST /api/aurora/open to obtain a runId and signal, then closing it via PUT /api/aurora/close using those values. I will perform these two steps sequentially, ensuring the required headers are included.
evidenceUsed: exact-copy relation between POST response runId and PUT request runId
exact-copy relation between POST response signal and PUT request signal
uncertainties: The specific channel index to use for the signal was inferred from the evidence as channel 23 (index 23 in the channels array).
